llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Intern, Communications
job.description: How You Will Do - Supporting the creation and maintenance of internet CN webpages from Q3 – Q4 2026 - Supporting the organization of exhibitions, internal and customer events in China, e.g., CHINAPLAS 2027 - Supporting the translations of marcom materials and copywriting of CN articles - Any other admin./logistical arrangements (e.g., arranging samples for events, creating Purchase Request, etc.) What We Look For - Education: Studying in Bachelor's Degree, major in Communications/Journalism or Marketing is preferred. - Preferred Internship Duration: 5 months - Working time: Minimum 3 days per week - Familiar with one of the following or similar tools: Photoshop, Canva, Content Management System, Microsoft 365 (Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Teams). - Good in Chinese and English in both spoken and written - A team player with good interpersonal skills - Experiences on photo/video editing and copywriting will be an advantage. 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。
